coreCompetencies: Basic understanding of how models take images, audio and text as inputs
Ability to load an image and run it through a pretrained vision model
Elementary knowledge of resizing, normalizing and formatting images for a model
Ability to run a pretrained image-text model such as CLIP on example pairs
Basic understanding of what an embedding is and how similarity is computed
Ability to extract frames from a video and audio from a clip under supervision
Elementary knowledge of reading model outputs for captioning or classification
Basic understanding of how text and image can share a common representation
complementaryCompetencies: Basic knowledge of Python and NumPy arrays
Familiarity with image libraries such as Pillow or OpenCV
Elementary understanding of tensors and their shapes
indicators: Requires constant supervision
Can run existing multimodal scripts with detailed guidance
Needs 3-6 months to be productive

coreCompetencies: Ability to build an image captioning or visual question answering prototype
Practical knowledge of preprocessing pipelines for image, audio and video
Ability to compute joint image-text embeddings and rank by similarity
Understanding of tokenizing text and patching images for transformer inputs
Ability to build image or text retrieval using a shared embedding space
Knowledge of measuring retrieval quality with recall and ranking metrics
Ability to handle different input resolutions, sampling rates and formats
Understanding of aligning timestamps across audio and video streams
complementaryCompetencies: Basic knowledge of vector search for embedding retrieval
Familiarity with torchvision and audio processing libraries
Basic understanding of spectrograms as audio input
indicators: Can build simple multimodal features independently
Resolves medium complexity issues in preprocessing and retrieval
Actively participates in code reviews

coreCompetencies: Ability to fine-tune a vision-language model for captioning or retrieval tasks
Ability to design fusion strategies combining image, text and audio features
Deep knowledge of contrastive training objectives used in CLIP-style models
Ability to build visual question answering over documents and images
Understanding of aligning modalities with cross-attention between encoders
Ability to evaluate multimodal outputs with task-specific and human metrics
Knowledge of handling missing or noisy modalities at inference time
Ability to instrument multimodal pipelines with per-modality tracing
complementaryCompetencies: Knowledge of diffusion models conditioned on text and image inputs
Ability to build datasets pairing images, audio and captions
Basic understanding of temporal modeling for video
indicators: Completes complex multimodal features with minimal supervision
Identifies and resolves failures in fusion and alignment
Actively contributes to technical design of multimodal systems

coreCompetencies: Ability to design multimodal architectures with early, late and hybrid fusion
Mastery of vision-language alignment with contrastive and generative objectives
Ability to build automated evaluation suites for captioning, retrieval and VQA
Deep knowledge of encoders for image, audio and video and their trade-offs
Ability to design multimodal generation combining text prompts and reference images
Mastery of large-scale preprocessing for image, audio and video datasets
Ability to fine-tune joint embedding models on domain-specific pairs
Knowledge of serving multimodal models with modality-specific batching
complementaryCompetencies: Knowledge of distillation for compact multimodal encoders
Ability to design cross-modal retrieval systems at scale
Understanding of temporal alignment for long video understanding
indicators: Leads development of critical multimodal components
Effectively mentors junior engineers
Makes informed architectural decisions on fusion and alignment

coreCompetencies: Expertise in designing production multimodal platforms for image, audio, video and text
Ability to architect scalable multimodal serving with modality-aware routing
Mastery of evaluation-driven development with multimodal benchmarks and human review
Deep knowledge of pretraining vision-language models on large paired corpora
Ability to design joint embedding spaces that scale across millions of items
Expertise in optimizing the accuracy, cost and latency of multimodal inference
Ability to build observability across preprocessing, fusion and generation stages
Mastery of handling modality imbalance and alignment failures in production
complementaryCompetencies: Knowledge of self-supervised objectives for multimodal representation learning
Ability to design multimodal benchmarks covering retrieval, VQA and generation
Understanding of bias and safety concerns specific to generated media
indicators: Designs multimodal architectures for complete products
Defines team technical standards for multimodal development
Leads cross-team initiatives on multimodal infrastructure

coreCompetencies: Ability to architect enterprise multimodal platforms shared across many teams
Expertise in governance frameworks for multimodal data and generated media
Mastery of evaluation infrastructure and continuous monitoring across modalities
Ability to lead build-versus-fine-tune decisions for vision-language models
Deep knowledge of security and privacy threats in image, audio and video data
Ability to lead adoption of multimodal features across existing products
Expertise in cost governance for compute-heavy multimodal training and serving
Mastery of reliability engineering for pipelines spanning several modalities
complementaryCompetencies: Knowledge of emerging multimodal architectures and open-weight models
Ability to design reusable multimodal datasets and evaluation catalogs
Understanding of on-device multimodal inference constraints
indicators: Architects multimodal solutions for multiple teams
Influences organizational technical decisions on multimodal AI
Represents the company technically in the multimodal domain

coreCompetencies: Technical leadership of organization-wide multimodal AI adoption
Ability to design multimodal architectures resilient to model and vendor change
Expertise in strategies for scaling multimodal features to large user bases
Mastery of model-agnostic abstractions across vision, audio and language models
Ability to define multi-year roadmaps for multimodal capabilities
Deep knowledge of the economics and total cost of multimodal systems
Expertise in building and scaling multimodal engineering teams
Ability to set standards for responsible use of generated and analyzed media
complementaryCompetencies: Ability to evaluate multimodal vendors and open-weight models technically
Knowledge of research trends in multimodal representation and generation
Ability to shape internal policy on multimodal data and media use
indicators: Defines organizational technical strategy for multimodal AI
Recognized as an authority in applied multimodal AI
Speaker at industry conferences on multimodal systems

coreCompetencies: Ability to set the long-term technical direction for multimodal AI in the organization
Expertise in aligning multimodal investment with product and safety priorities
Mastery of technical due diligence for multimodal products and acquisitions
Ability to anticipate shifts in vision-language models and adapt architecture strategy
Deep knowledge of the risk and compliance landscape for generated and analyzed media
Ability to build and lead multimodal engineering organizations
Expertise in defining responsible media practices at organizational scale
Ability to guide trade-offs between in-house pretraining and foundation model reliance
complementaryCompetencies: Ability to inform industry standards for media provenance and consent
Knowledge of the multimodal model vendor and hardware landscape
Ability to advise leadership on multimodal risk and opportunity

coreCompetencies: Ability to define the organization's multimodal AI technical vision and safety posture
Expertise in aligning multimodal strategy with product direction and regulation
Mastery of governing large-scale multimodal training and inference investment
Ability to steer sourcing of vision-language models across vendors and open weights
Deep knowledge of managing privacy, consent and reputational risk of media processing
Ability to build organizational capability for responsible multimodal AI at scale
Expertise in setting provenance and disclosure standards for generated media
Ability to sustain competitive advantage through applied multimodal AI
complementaryCompetencies: Ability to influence regulation and standards for multimodal AI and media
Knowledge of the multimodal vendor, hardware and talent ecosystem
Ability to represent the organization on multimodal AI safety externally
indicators: Sets and executes the multimodal AI technical vision
